All right, creating your culture. So what does it look like to create a culture? I have actually included a culture checklist so that you can easily evaluate where your cultural culture currently sits. Okay, because I know a lot of you are coming into this and you either have an accidental culture meaning you've never established emission values, etc. So you kind of just have this like unclear jumble or you're looking to improve it, right? And so why do you need to go through the culture checklist? Okay, because you need to evaluate your strengths and deficits and then prioritize where you need to take action first. Okay, and this checklist is actually something that Alex and I did about two years ago and we still do it on a about every two quarters to kind of evaluate, okay, where do we need to put our focus internally to make sure that we are building a stable business, right? And so I would like you to do the same and then prioritize those by action, you know, which one affects your business the most and to the highest degree, right? Going hand in hand with this, I will also like ask you to look through our example of a holiday and celebration list to see what you stand for. And so what I mean by that is I always, I've always wanted to build a company that has a wow factor to it. So meaning I really look up to companies like Zappos for going above and beyond. And it's something that I wanted to have in our culture. And so if you want anything to be repeated, you need it written down and you need to understood by everyone. And so for us, I was like, okay, for all think about life monumental, you know, times in your life, like say marriage, having a baby, moving to a new house, I want those things celebrated. I want holiday celebrated. And then how do we want to celebrate them? What's the budget? And who's responsible for it? And I tell you, like, if you this is not something that you as an owner have to do, this is something that you can delegate to a teammate that you feel would absolutely love to own this. Because I'm telling you, when I delegated this after about a month, and they love it, everyone who owns this, everyone as a part of it absolutely loves it, because people like to celebrate. Okay. So if you want a culture that has a lot of positivity in it, I really do suggest that you take a look at our example, and you build something similar for your gym.
